general: Consistency beats intensity when building long-term typing speed. Focus on clean keystrokes and your fingers will naturally get faster over time.
The quickest typists are not always the fastest thinkers. They are the most rhythmically accurate writers who avoid corrections and keep momentum.
Practice with posture, relaxed shoulders, and gentle key pressure. Small ergonomic habits reduce fatigue and improve daily productivity.
Touch typing is a compound skill. Ten focused minutes every day can outperform a single long session once a week.

const users = data
  .filter((item) => item.active)
  .map((item) => ({ id: item.id, name: item.name }))
  .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
